p3_runner_build_report_smoke_count_corre: The P3 runner build report (committed 30fbc6a) recorded files_authored.tests_test_smoke_t1_t15_py.test_count_authored = 17 (a value carried over from the s13-d1 sibling). The smoke file actually contains 19 test functions (the name-list in that same P3 report is correct at 19). P4 collected and PASSED all 19 smoke + 13 OOS = 32. This P4 report is the authoritative count. The sealed P3 report is NOT modified; this note records the discrepancy transparently in the new artifact.

pytest_invocation_protocol.rootdir_pinned_to_tests_dir_rationale: repo root contains a malformed sibling directory (private-use-char name) that breaks pytest's default rootdir walk; pinning --rootdir/--confcutdir to the harness tests dir confines collection and avoids the unrelated FileNotFoundError. Repo-root scan NOT required for these tests.
